text:
Witch's Love Potion 魔女の媚薬 - is a card found in the Greed Island game. It is one of the game's 100 designated slot cards and so is required for a player to complete the game.
__NOTOC__

Card Info

|align=center|魔女の媚薬 
まじょのびやく 
(Majyo no Biyaku)
|bgcolor="DAFDDA" align=center|(Aphrodisiac of the Witch)
|
|-

|align=center colspan="3"|#064
|
|-
!
|align=center colspan="3"|Rank: B 
Transformation: 30
|
|-
!Card Effect:
|align=center colspan="3"|Kiss a pill and have your intended drink it, and he or she will fall in love with you. One pill lasts one week; one vial contains 500 pills.
|
|-
!How to Obtain:
|align=center colspan="3"|(unknown)
|

Summary

Witch's Love Potion 魔女の媚薬 - This card allows the caster to make someone fall in love with them. The activation requirement is that you first kiss the pill, and then you have your target ingest it. Providing these two conditions are met, the target will fall in love with you. Each pill lasts one week. Each vial contains 500 pills.

Card Description

{| border="0" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="article-table" style="height: 10px; color: #1A004C; background-color: #EEFFEE"
![Jap]
|No.064 :: 魔女の媚薬 
この薬に口づけして意中の相手に飲ませれば、その人はあなたの虜になる。粒の効き目は１週間。１ビン500粒入り。
|-
![Eng]
|No.064 :: Witch's Love Potion 
If you ask another party to ingest this pill when you've given it a kiss, that person becomes captivated for you. The effect lasts a week. 500 pills in 1 bottle.
|}
